title: Make the operator ecosystem machine-first
goal: Make ChatGPT through Grabowski the deterministic machine operator while the user remains observer and steersman: the user supplies goals, meaning, priorities, risk tolerance, approvals, interventions and stop decisions; the operator observes live state, plans, registers, executes, verifies and reports through typed, provenance-bound surfaces without creating a second task, runtime or architecture truth.
completion: Grabowski exposes and consumes the canonical local operator entry through a typed, hash-bound read and scope-routing surface.
Connector snapshot identity and structural contract compatibility are observable and drift fails closed without claiming model comprehension or universal client compliance.
A valid lease either prevents foreign writes in its write scope or produces complete, attributable conflict evidence before publication.
The Bureau CLI, deployed package and selected checkout expose the same source identity and cannot silently execute stale code.
The canonical Bureau launcher and Grabowski lease consumer converge on one immutable release identity and rollback chain.
Bureau state-root evidence and plan directories are classified or migrated without deleting unknown operator data.
The existing RepoBrief provenance task binds source commit, dirty state and generation time before freshness can be current.
Systemkatalog stable semantics are available through a typed read-only operator surface with explicit non-claims.
Metarepo contracts resolve reproducibly in isolated worktrees without hidden sibling-path or environment assumptions.
Optional heim-pc state projections carry generator, source, timestamp and content provenance; absence remains a valid state.
A fresh end-to-end consumer test reaches the correct host, semantic, task and runtime truths without human shell assistance.

Bureau candidate intake, assessment and reviewed task publication are consumable through typed operator-native calls without human shell work, manual JSON editing or prose parsing; CLI remains a transport and diagnostic fallback.

metadata.source_request: User required the entire operator ecosystem and the canonical heim-pc entry to be optimized for machine readability because ChatGPT through Grabowski is the operator.

role_contract.authority_boundary: The role split does not override explicit cost, safety, privacy, irreversible-effect or approval gates.

machine_operability_correction.correction: Human-facing convenience is secondary. Primary surfaces are optimized for deterministic operator consumption.
